# Generated UI Code

This folder will contain the C code generated by LVGL Pro Editor.

## ⚠️ DO NOT EDIT FILES ENDING IN `_gen.c` or `_gen.h`

These files are automatically regenerated each time you export from LVGL Pro Editor. Any manual changes will be lost.

## What goes here

When you export the UI from LVGL Pro Editor:

1. **Generated files** (`*_gen.c`, `*_gen.h`) - Auto-generated, don't edit
2. **User files** (`*.c`, `*.h`) - Created once, safe to edit for custom logic

## Structure after export

```
ui_generated/
├── m5dial_ui.h              # Main header (user file)
├── m5dial_ui.c              # Main implementation (user file)
├── m5dial_ui_gen.h          # Generated header (DON'T EDIT)
├── m5dial_ui_gen.c          # Generated implementation (DON'T EDIT)
├── screens/                 # Screen files
│   ├── main_menu_gen.c
│   ├── main_menu_gen.h
│   ├── lamp_control_gen.c
│   └── ...
└── components/              # Component files
    ├── menu_item_gen.c
    └── ...
```

## How to generate

1. Open `ui/` folder in LVGL Pro Editor
2. File → Export → C Code
3. Set export path to this folder
4. Click Export

The generated code is automatically included in the PlatformIO build.
